HomeAbout

Building India's Aerospace Ecosystem

Through Education, Innovation & Industry Collaboration

The Institute of Aeronautics, Astronautics and Aviation (IAAA) is a registered non-profit trust and association, accredited by the Council for Technical and Vocational Development Science TN (CTDS TN).

IAAA bridges academia, industry, and government to provide globally recognized aerospace education, technical training, and professional development. Through education, innovation, and collaboration, IAAA empowers students, faculties, professionals, industry leaders, and policymakers to lead advancements in Aeronautics, Astronautics, Aviation, Drone Technology, and Space Sciences.

Meet Our Council

Our Vision

To make aerospace education accessible, practical, and industry-oriented for students, faculties, and professionals across India.

Our Mission

  • Integrate research, skill-building, and innovation in aerospace education
  • Foster collaborations between academia and industry
  • Build employability through global-standard certification programs
  • Recognize excellence through structured memberships and awards

What We Do

Comprehensive aerospace ecosystem development through multiple channels

Education Excellence

Globally recognized diplomas and certifications aligned with DGCA and NSDC standards.

Student-Centric

Empowering 10,000+ students across 100+ institutions nationwide.

Industry Partnerships

Connecting academia with 80+ industry partners for real-world exposure.

Professional Recognition

Structured membership levels and awards for excellence in aerospace.

Regional Presence

25 Regional Hubs across India for localized support and training.

Global Standards

Curriculum aligned with international aerospace industry requirements.

Ready to Join India's Aerospace Community?

Become part of the IAAA network and shape the future of aerospace in India.

Join as MemberContact Us
IAAAAerospace Institute

Empowering India's Aerospace Community - From School to Sky.
